--- title: "17. Causal Inference: Same Backend (SB) - Laplace Kernel" output: rmarkdown::html_vignette: highlight: null code_folding: show vignette: > %\VignetteIndexEntry{17. Causal Inference: Same Backend (SB) - Laplace Kernel} %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown} %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8} --- > **Legacy vignette (for the website / historical notes).** > These files may not match the current exported API one-to-one. > Last verified: **2026-01-18**. > > For the up-to-date workflow, see the main package vignettes (Introduction, Model Spec, MCMC Workflow, Unconditional/Conditional/Causal, Backends, S3 Reference). # Causal Inference: Same Backend (SB) - Laplace Kernel {#causal-sb-same-backend} This vignette fits two SB-based causal models using the same kernel (Laplace): - Model A: bulk-only outcome models (GPD = FALSE) - Model B: GPD-augmented outcome models (GPD = TRUE) --- ## Data Setup ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} data("causal_alt_real500_p4_k2") y <- causal_alt_real500_p4_k2$y T <- causal_alt_real500_p4_k2$T X <- as.matrix(causal_alt_real500_p4_k2$X) summary_tbl <- tibble( statistic = c("N", "Mean", "SD", "Min", "Max"), value = c(length(y), mean(y), sd(y), min(y), max(y)) ) summary_tbl %>% mutate(value = signif(value, 4)) %>% kable(caption = "Causal Dataset Summary", align = "c") %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE, position = "center") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
Causal Dataset Summary
statistic value
N 500.000
Mean 0.274
SD 1.764
Min -8.089
Max 5.275
````` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} x_eval <- X[1:40, , drop = FALSE] y_eval <- y[1:40] u_threshold <- as.numeric(stats::quantile(y, 0.8, names = FALSE)) ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} df_causal <- data.frame(y = y, T = as.factor(T), x1 = X[, 1], x2 = X[, 2]) p_scatter <- ggplot(df_causal, aes(x = x1, y = y, color = T)) + geom_point(alpha = 0.5) + labs(title = "Outcome vs X1 by Treatment", x = "X1", y = "y", color = "Treatment") + theme_minimal() p_scatter ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](v17-causal-same-backend-SB_files/figure-html/data-scatter-1.png){width=768} ::: ::: --- ## Model A: SB Bulk-only (Laplace) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} bundle_sb_bulk <- build_causal_bundle( y = y, T = T, X = X, kernel = "laplace", backend = "sb", PS = "logit", GPD = FALSE, components = 5, mcmc_outcome = list(niter = 2500, nburnin = 500, nchains = 1, thin = 1, seed = 1), mcmc_ps = list(niter = 2500, nburnin = 500, nchains = 1, thin = 1, seed = 1) ) bundle_sb_bulk ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` DPmixGPD causal bundle PS model: Bayesian logit (T | X)
Field Treated Control
Backend Stick-Breaking Process Stick-Breaking Process
Kernel laplace laplace
Components 5 5
GPD tail FALSE FALSE
Epsilon 0.025 0.025
Outcome PS included: TRUE n (control) = 232 | n (treated) = 268 ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} summary(bundle_sb_bulk) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` DPmixGPD causal bundle summary DPmixGPD causal bundle PS model: Bayesian logit (T | X)
Field Treated Control
Backend Stick-Breaking Process Stick-Breaking Process
Kernel laplace laplace
Components 5 5
GPD tail FALSE FALSE
Epsilon 0.025 0.025
Outcome PS included: TRUE n (control) = 232 | n (treated) = 268 ``` ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} fit_sb_bulk <- run_mcmc_causal(bundle_sb_bulk) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` ===== Monitors ===== thin = 1: beta ===== Samplers ===== RW sampler (5) - beta[] (5 elements) ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` |-------------|-------------|-------------|-------------| |-------------------------------------------------------| ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` ===== Monitors ===== thin = 1: alpha, beta_location, beta_ps_location, scale, w, z ===== Samplers ===== RW sampler (30) - alpha - beta_location[] (20 elements) - beta_ps_location[] (5 elements) - v[] (4 elements) conjugate sampler (5) - scale[] (5 elements) categorical sampler (232) - z[] (232 elements) ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` ===== Monitors ===== thin = 1: alpha, beta_location, beta_ps_location, scale, w, z ===== Samplers ===== RW sampler (30) - alpha - beta_location[] (20 elements) - beta_ps_location[] (5 elements) - v[] (4 elements) conjugate sampler (5) - scale[] (5 elements) categorical sampler (268) - z[] (268 elements) ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} summary(fit_sb_bulk) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` -- PS fit -- DPmixGPD PS fit model: logit -- Outcome fits -- [control] MixGPD fit | backend: Stick-Breaking Process | kernel: Laplace Distribution | GPD tail: FALSE n = 232 | components = 5 | epsilon = 0.025 MCMC: niter=2500, nburnin=500, thin=1, nchains=1 Fit Use summary() for posterior summaries; plot() for diagnostics; predict() for predictions. [treated] MixGPD fit | backend: Stick-Breaking Process | kernel: Laplace Distribution | GPD tail: FALSE n = 268 | components = 5 | epsilon = 0.025 MCMC: niter=2500, nburnin=500, thin=1, nchains=1 Fit Use summary() for posterior summaries; plot() for diagnostics; predict() for predictions. ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} params(fit_sb_bulk) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Posterior mean parameters (causal) [treated] Posterior mean parameters $alpha [1] "2.302" $w [1] "0.425" "0.277" "0.167" $beta_location
x1 x2 x3 x4
comp1 0.784 -0.463 -0.367 0.423
comp2 -0.095 -0.912 -0.267 0.413
comp3 0.123 0.957 0.151 0.093
comp4 0.259 -0.217 0.189 -0.185
comp5 0.196 -0.008 0.386 0.824
$beta_ps_location [1] "-0.909" "0.361" "-0.23" "0.111" "0.01" $scale [1] "0.863" "1.057" "1.493" [control] Posterior mean parameters $alpha [1] "0.957" $w [1] "0.505" "0.334" $beta_location
x1 x2 x3 x4
comp1 -0.196 -0.038 -0.248 1.827
comp2 0.472 0.183 -0.426 -0.217
comp3 0.221 0.405 -0.276 0.527
comp4 0.14 -0.051 0.024 0.538
comp5 -0.551 0.197 -0.166 -0.241
$beta_ps_location [1] "-0.21" "-1.001" "-0.617" "0.064" "0.25" $scale [1] "0.977" "1.164" ``` ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} if (interactive()) plot(fit_sb_bulk, family = c("traceplot", "autocorrelation", "running")) ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} pred_mean_bulk <- predict(fit_sb_bulk, x = x_eval, type = "mean", interval = "credible", nsim_mean = 100) if (interactive()) plot(pred_mean_bulk) ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} pred_q_bulk <- predict(fit_sb_bulk, x = x_eval, type = "quantile", p = 0.5, interval = "credible") if (interactive()) plot(pred_q_bulk) ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} pred_d_bulk <- predict(fit_sb_bulk, x = x_eval, y = y_eval, type = "density", interval = "credible") if (interactive()) plot(pred_d_bulk) ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} pred_surv_bulk <- predict(fit_sb_bulk, x = x_eval, y = y_eval, type = "survival", interval = "credible") if (interactive()) plot(pred_surv_bulk) ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} ate_bulk <- ate(fit_sb_bulk, newdata = x_eval, interval = "credible", nsim_mean = 100) if (interactive()) plot(ate_bulk) ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} qte_bulk <- qte(fit_sb_bulk, probs = c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75), newdata = x_eval, interval = "credible") if (interactive()) plot(qte_bulk) ``` ::: --- ## Model B: SB with GPD Tail (Laplace) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} param_specs_gpd <- list( gpd = list( threshold = list( mode = "dist", dist = "lognormal", args = list(meanlog = log(max(u_threshold, .Machine$double.eps)), sdlog = 0.25) ) ) ) bundle_sb_gpd <- build_causal_bundle( y = y, T = T, X = X, kernel = "laplace", backend = "sb", PS = "logit", GPD = TRUE, components = 5, param_specs = param_specs_gpd, mcmc_outcome = list(niter = 2500, nburnin = 500, nchains = 1, thin = 1, seed = 2), mcmc_ps = list(niter = 2500, nburnin = 500, nchains = 1, thin = 1, seed = 2) ) bundle_sb_gpd ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` DPmixGPD causal bundle PS model: Bayesian logit (T | X)
Field Treated Control
Backend Stick-Breaking Process Stick-Breaking Process
Kernel laplace laplace
Components 5 5
GPD tail TRUE TRUE
Epsilon 0.025 0.025
Outcome PS included: TRUE n (control) = 232 | n (treated) = 268 ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} summary(bundle_sb_gpd) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` DPmixGPD causal bundle summary DPmixGPD causal bundle PS model: Bayesian logit (T | X)
Field Treated Control
Backend Stick-Breaking Process Stick-Breaking Process
Kernel laplace laplace
Components 5 5
GPD tail TRUE TRUE
Epsilon 0.025 0.025
Outcome PS included: TRUE n (control) = 232 | n (treated) = 268 ``` ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} fit_sb_gpd <- run_mcmc_causal(bundle_sb_gpd) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` ===== Monitors ===== thin = 1: beta ===== Samplers ===== RW sampler (5) - beta[] (5 elements) ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` |-------------|-------------|-------------|-------------| |-------------------------------------------------------| ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` ===== Monitors ===== thin = 1: alpha, beta_location, beta_ps_location, beta_tail_scale, scale, tail_shape, threshold, w, z ===== Samplers ===== RW sampler (41) - alpha - scale[] (5 elements) - beta_location[] (20 elements) - beta_ps_location[] (5 elements) - threshold - beta_tail_scale[] (4 elements) - tail_shape - v[] (4 elements) categorical sampler (232) - z[] (232 elements) ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` ===== Monitors ===== thin = 1: alpha, beta_location, beta_ps_location, beta_tail_scale, scale, tail_shape, threshold, w, z ===== Samplers ===== RW sampler (41) - alpha - scale[] (5 elements) - beta_location[] (20 elements) - beta_ps_location[] (5 elements) - threshold - beta_tail_scale[] (4 elements) - tail_shape - v[] (4 elements) categorical sampler (268) - z[] (268 elements) ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} summary(fit_sb_gpd) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` -- PS fit -- DPmixGPD PS fit model: logit -- Outcome fits -- [control] MixGPD fit | backend: Stick-Breaking Process | kernel: Laplace Distribution | GPD tail: TRUE n = 232 | components = 5 | epsilon = 0.025 MCMC: niter=2500, nburnin=500, thin=1, nchains=1 Fit Use summary() for posterior summaries; plot() for diagnostics; predict() for predictions. [treated] MixGPD fit | backend: Stick-Breaking Process | kernel: Laplace Distribution | GPD tail: TRUE n = 268 | components = 5 | epsilon = 0.025 MCMC: niter=2500, nburnin=500, thin=1, nchains=1 Fit Use summary() for posterior summaries; plot() for diagnostics; predict() for predictions. ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} params(fit_sb_gpd) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Posterior mean parameters (causal) [treated] Posterior mean parameters $alpha [1] "0.883" $w [1] "0.47" "0.315" "0.168" $beta_location

$beta_ps_location [1] "-2.575" "0.943" "-0.036" "0.15" "-0.275" $scale [1] "1.052" "1.167" $beta_tail_scale [1] "0.306" "0.202" "0.098" "-0.083" $tail_shape [1] "-0.037" ``` ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} if (interactive()) plot(fit_sb_gpd, family = c("density", "geweke", "caterpillar")) ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} pred_mean_gpd <- predict(fit_sb_gpd, x = x_eval, type = "mean", interval = "credible", nsim_mean = 100) if (interactive()) plot(pred_mean_gpd) ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} pred_q_gpd <- predict(fit_sb_gpd, x = x_eval, type = "quantile", p = 0.5, interval = "credible") if (interactive()) plot(pred_q_gpd) ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} pred_d_gpd <- predict(fit_sb_gpd, x = x_eval, y = y_eval, type = "density", interval = "credible") if (interactive()) plot(pred_d_gpd) ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} pred_surv_gpd <- predict(fit_sb_gpd, x = x_eval, y = y_eval, type = "survival", interval = "credible") if (interactive()) plot(pred_surv_gpd) ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} ate_gpd <- ate(fit_sb_gpd, newdata = x_eval, interval = "credible", nsim_mean = 100) if (interactive()) plot(ate_gpd) ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} qte_gpd <- qte(fit_sb_gpd, probs = c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75), newdata = x_eval, interval = "credible") if (interactive()) plot(qte_gpd) ``` :::
